programs.title: Log Cabin Living
programs.desc: Avid hunters Cameron and Mandy are hoping to move their two kids to a log cabin that's a near recreation of Cameron's childhood memories of a home with plenty of square footage and property for outdoor activities.

programs.title: Log Cabin Living
programs.desc: Brett and Amy want a change of pace for their two teenage daughters, Katie and Emily, after constantly finding themselves in the mountains hiking, fishing and hunting.

programs.title: Mountain Life
programs.desc: A couple is ready to escape the noise and bustle of Charlotte, N.C., and surround themselves with breathtaking views in a Blue Ridge Mountain vacation home; they look for a place in nearby Hendersonville with enough space for their growing family.

programs.title: Mountain Life
programs.sub_title: Quest for the Perfect Cascade Range Mountain Home
programs.desc: A woman and her son hunt for a mountain home; with most of her clients based in Portland, Ore., the home buyer wants to settle in the Columbia River Valley region with views of the Northern Cascade Mountain Range and the Columbia River Gorge.

programs.title: Mountain Life
programs.sub_title: From City to Nature in Humboldt County, California
programs.desc: A couple wants to escape the rat race in crowded Seattle and get back to their roots in northern California's Humboldt County; one wants a home with an office so she can continue her career, and the other wants a huge kitchen for entertaining.

programs.title: Mountain Life
programs.sub_title: Hunting for a Rock Climbing Retreat in Tucson, Arizona
programs.desc: A young Southern California couple grows tired of enduring hours in the traffic and gets ready to move to sunny Tucson, Ariz.; they look for ample guest quarters and an outdoor living space with a great pool.
